given: The S3 up migration has been applied and inventory_code column is dropped
when: The S3 down migration is executed to rollback the schema change
then: The inventory_code column is present on the stock table
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on the stock data-store shape (the Alembic down migration adds the inventory_code column back), proven by a parent-aware schema diff against the paired Lakebase branch. Owner: the Alembic revision in the repository/migration layer. Cross-cutting concern: migration reversibility (R4), schema evolution, owned at the repository/migration layer, never the domain or boundary.

independence.rationale: AC1 tests the up migration removes the column; AC2 tests the down migration restores it
